description_long: This is a single, low-cut lace-up shoe with a rounded toe and a dark, matte finish. The upper appears to be made of leather or synthetic leather, with visible creases and a slightly worn texture. The shoe features a standard criss-cross lacing system with metal eyelets and black laces. The sole is thick, flat, and made of a dark brown rubber material, providing durability and grip. The interior is padded and lined, likely for comfort, and the heel is reinforced for added support. There are no visible logos or brand markings on the exterior surfaces.
description: A dark, low-cut lace-up shoe with a rounded toe, matte leather-like upper, and thick brown rubber sole. The shoe shows signs of light wear and has a standard criss-cross lacing system.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded toe, laces, and slight creasing on the upper.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the shoe's profile, thick sole, and lacing system.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the heel, padded collar, and back seam.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the shoe's overall shape and construction.
